Container.Name: telemon-exporter
Container.Overview: Telemon host exporter for Prometheus. Uses host networking, persistent UUID state, and read-only host sysfs mounts.

Config.Name: Host sysfs
Config.Description: Read-only host sysfs mount. Required because hwmon entries often symlink into /sys/devices.

Config.Name: Enrollment Token
Config.Description: Shared enrollment token from the registry config.

Config.Name: User Name
Config.Description: Human user label for Grafana filters.

Config.Name: Device Name
Config.Description: Human device label for Grafana filters.

Config.Name: Advertised Address
Config.Description: Unraid LAN IP Prometheus should scrape. Recommended for Unraid.

Config.Name: Include Unknown hwmon Sensors
Config.Description: Include sensors from hwmon chips that are not classified by the exporter yet. Recommended for Unraid/NAS hardware.
